title: SPECIAL EDUCATION SERVICES - 211info
text: WILLAMETTE ESD YAMHILL CENTER SPECIAL EDUCATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers direct instruction and related services to children and students with special needs, their families and school districts. 2045 SW Highway 18 Suite 100 McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Special education programs provide instruction to students in grades K-12, ages 5-21. Referral and placement decisions are based on recommendations by the IEP team, which includes the child's family. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 435-5900 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 435-5900 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties Services: Special Education Plan Development Student Disability Services Transition Services for Students with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MIGRANT EDUCATION PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOL REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - EARLY LEARNING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WILLAMETTE ESD YAMHILL CENTER
